Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-13-59_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Failing test: "should rotate a vertical blinker into a horizontal blinker"
Expected behavior: nextGeneration([[0,0], [0,1], [0,2]]) returns [[-1,1], [0,1], [1,1]] (order-independent)
Current error: assertion fails - expected Set{"-1,1", "0,1", "1,1"}, received Set{"0,1"}
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-13-59_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts

Implement the reproduction rule: dead cells with exactly 3 live neighbors become alive.
Approach: enumerate all candidate cells (live cells + their neighbors), then for each candidate apply Game of Life rules.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the Green phase by reading the current state and adding minimal code to make the blinker test pass.
I need to add the reproduction rule. The minimal change: enumerate all candidate cells (live cells + their dead neighbors), then apply the rules to each.

content.text:
All 5 active tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added candidate enumeration (live cells + their neighbors) and applied both survival and reproduction rules.
- Result: All 5 active tests pass (3 todos remaining).
- Approach: Built a candidate map of all cells potentially alive next generation (each live cell plus its 8 neighbors), then for each candidate counted live neighbors and kept it if either (a) it was alive and has 2 or 3 neighbors (survival) or (b) it was dead and has exactly 3 neighbors (reproduction). This is the minimal change required to handle the blinker case where dead cells `(-1,1)` and `(1,1)` come alive.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-13-59_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-13-59_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.spec.ts

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
